sentences.translation: Jedi voće i povrće svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: Eat fruits and vegetables every day.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَحْتَوِي عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ مُفِيدَةٍ لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Oni sadrže mnogo vitamina korisnih za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: They contain many vitamins that are beneficial for the body.

sentences.arabic: الطَّعَامُ الصِّحِّيُّ يُسَاعِدُكَ أَنْ تَشْعُرَ بِالنَّشَاطِ.
sentences.translation: Zdrava hrana ti pomaže da se osjećaš energično.
sentences.translationEn: Healthy food helps you feel energetic.
